query: SELECT quoteNumber, rtDest1, rtDest1Active, rtDest2, rtDest2Active, rtDest3, rtDest3Active FROM quotes WHERE quoteNumber LIKE '33.0058%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute SELECT quoteNumber, rtDest1, rtDest1Active, rtDest2, rtDest2Active, rtDest3, rtDest3Active FROM quotes WHERE quoteNumber LIKE '33.0058%';
